project.name: Code Atlas :: Explorer UI
project.description: A local, loopback-only, read-only explorer: search the model, open an entity, and navigate its callers, dependencies and data lineage by clicking through relationships, with pan/zoom graph inspection. Server-rendered HTML with a light/dark/auto theme; the CSS and script are inline and nothing loads from another host, so it runs on an offline or locked-down workstation, and the script is progressive enhancement only. Built on the read-only tool API and the JDK's built-in HTTP server — no new dependencies.
